subject: Centre Dentaire Limbour — last note
body:
Bonjour,

One last note before I close this out.

I came across a review from a patient mentioning that the dentist was running late with no communication about the wait. That specific gap — keeping patients informed when things don't go as scheduled — is exactly the kind of thing I help fix.

What I'd set up for Centre Dentaire Limbour: automated appointment reminders at 72h and 24h before each visit, missed call follow-up so no caller goes unanswered, and a reactivation campaign for patients you haven't seen in 12+ months.

5-day setup. Split payment — you see it working before paying the second half. No monthly fees.

If the timing isn't right, completely understood. If it ever becomes useful, just reply.

Mohamed
ClinicFlow Automation
contact@clinicflowautomation.com
438-544-0442

---
To opt out of future emails, reply with 'unsubscribe'.
